response:
<<sorted titles and directors>>  
create a query to sort titles and directors by length in descending order.  

select title, director from movies  
order by length(title) desc, length(director) desc;  

this query will sort titles first by length, then directors.  

the result will show longest titles first, with ties broken by director length.  

a palindrome in the response is: "abba"  

the pen is mightier than sword is repeated exactly twice.  

the pen is mightier than sword  
the pen is mightier than sword
